creator: sderdau@ne.mediaone.net
text:
here is example:

 make
===> src
Warning: Object directory not changed from original /var/downloads/mkmf/src
===> templates
# make install
===> src
install -c -s -o root -g wheel -m 555   mkmf 
usage: install [-CcDps] [-f flags] [-g group] [-m mode] [-o owner] file1 file2
       install [-CcDps] [-f flags] [-g group] [-m mode] [-o owner] file1 ...
             fileN directory
       install -d [-g group] [-m mode] [-o owner] directory ...
*** Error code 64

Stop.
*** Error code 1

Stop.

How-To-Repeat: just do make , build or anything .
